locations.name: 约翰·古尔德
locations.summary: 约翰·古尔德 FRS（英語：John Gould，1804年9月14日—1881年2月3日）是19世纪一位英国鸟类学家。1804年生于英格兰，也是一位商人、艺术家。1838年后与其妻一同前往澳大利亚，在当地发现并為许多新物种命名。 早年…

relations.subject: Grey falcon
relations.evidence: The grey falcon (Falco hypoleucos) is a medium-sized falcon native to Australia, possibly the rarest.{{cite journal |doi=10.1017/S0959270920000106 |title=Phylogeography of the rare Australian endemic Grey Falcon Falco hypoleucos: implications for conservation |journal=Bird Conservation International|volume=287 |pages=447–455 |year=2020 |last1=Mullin|first1=Dale W

relations.subject: Grey falcon
relations.evidence: It inhabits Triodia grassland, Acacia shrubland, and lightly timbered arid woodland. It has been sighted over most of mainland Australia except for Cape York
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.evidence: It inhabits Triodia grassland, Acacia shrubland, and lightly timbered arid woodland. It has been sighted over most of mainland Australia except for Cape York
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: Grey falcon
relations.evidence: When they have been occasionally seen outside of these areas, they have been found in similar dry, low altitude, open woodland or grassland
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。
